scenario: DB_PATH env var unset, no Postgres available — script imports sqlite3 and writes to a file derived from env
expected_behaviors: Static scan detects sqlite3 import and DB_PATH env var requirement
Live probe (or env var check) determines DB_PATH is unset OR file path unwritable
Skill surfaces a clear pre-run error naming the missing prerequisite
Skill does NOT run the webhook handler with a guessed DB_PATH

bugs.description: Skill must refuse to run when DB_PATH is unset and surface a clear 'set DB_PATH and re-run' error. Silent failures break user trust.
